desktop.measurementText: 4KV heads2.15 GBcache at 32k8.0xreduction vs MHA13%bandwidth pressure
desktop.observationText: Observation ledgerWhat changed: g = 8 gives H_kv = 4.What stayed true: memory changes linearly with H_kv.Next: raise T to 128k and check whether the 8.0x ratio survives.
